LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT COOK & FOY LLC'S (D.B.A. ELBO ROOM) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WAUL'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THERE IS AN ISSUE OF FACT TO BE RESOLVED WHETHER BY THE JUDGE AS PART OF DETERMINING THE LEGAL ISSUE OR BY THE JURY. OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD ON DEFENDANT COOK & FOY, LLC DBA ELBO ROOM'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING, EVIDENTIARY, OR ISSUE SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WAUL, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO COMPEL INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY AND OTHER JUST SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF. RULING AFTER HEARING: MEDICAL EXAMINATION IS ORDERED FOR AUGUST 15, 2008 UNDER THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: TAKING OF A MEDICAL HISTORY, CONDUCTING A VISUAL EXAMINATION OF THE EYES, TESTING THE VISION, TESTING EYESIGHT, TESTING FOR GLAUCOMA WITH THE USE OF AN APPLANATION TONOMETER, AND DILATING THE EYES. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. CSR: FREDDIE REPPONT

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENA IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE SUBPOENA IS LIMITED TO DOCUMENTS IN THE FOLLOWING CATEGORIES: DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ON OR AFTER MAY 1, 2006, TO SHOW THAT HE CAN OPERATE A MOTOR VEHICLE; DOCUMENTS CREATED BY DMV SINCE MAY 1, 2006, CONCERNING PLAINTIFF'S ABILITY TO DRIVE A MOTOR VEHICLE, INCLUDING ANY RESTRICTIONS; DOCUMENTS REFLECTING THE RESULTS OF ANY VISION TESTS OF PLAINTIFF ON OR AFTER MAY 1, 2006; DOCUMENTS CONCERNING PLAINTIFF'S VISION ON OR AFTER MAY 1, 2006; AND DOCUMENTS CONCERNING PLAINTIFF EYES ON OR AFTER MAY 1, 2006. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories(Set Two) And Requests For Produciton Of Docuements (Set Two)
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael A. Waul, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party; Paul A. Kanter, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Michael Waul's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set Two) And Requests For Production Of Documents (Set Two) is denied as overly broad and invasive of financial without compelling good cause. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice And Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary Or Issue Sanctions Against Pltf Or/Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf In The Amount Of $3,440.00
Off Calendar Aug-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Paul A. Kanter, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Cook & Foy, LLC; Michael A. Waul, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party

HEARING HELD on Defendant Cook & Foy, LLC dba Elbo Room's Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Or Issue Sanctions Against Plaintiff Michael Waul, or in the alternative, Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination And Request For Monetary And Other Just Sanctions Against Plaintiff.

RULING AFTER HEARING: Medical examination is ordered for August 15, 2008 under the following conditions: taking of a medical history, conducting a visual examination of the eyes, testing the vision, testing eyesight, testing for glaucoma with the use of an applanation tonometer, and dilating the eyes. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. CSR: Freddie Reppont

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MICHAEL A. WAUL, TEL. NO. 563-2652 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL A. KANTER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MARK R. MITTELMAN, TEL. NO. (925) 256-0677 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT COOK & FOY LLC D.B.A. ELBO ROOM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WAUL'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THERE IS AN ISSUE OF FACT TO BE RESOLVED WHETHER BY THE JUDGE AS PART OF DETERMINING THE LEGAL ISSUE OR BY THE JURY. OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/X-MW

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Second Set Of Requests For The Production Of Documents To Pltf Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf. In The Amt. 1390.00
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Mark Mittelman, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Cook & Foy, LLC. dba ELBO Roo; Michael A. Waul, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Michal A. Waul

Hearing held on Defendant Cook & Foy, LLC dba Elbo Room's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Second Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents To Plaintiff, And Request For Monetary Sanctions. RULING AFTER HEARING: Plaintiff is ordered to comply with the prior ruling after hearing with the exception of the settlement agreements. That issue maybe raised by a new motion. The matters raised by this motion are covered by the prior ruling after hearing and are incorporated into this order except as the prior order relates to the settlement agreements. Sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Subpoena
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Quash Subpoena is granted in part and denied in part. The subpoena is limited to documents in the following categories: documents submitted by Plaintiff on or after May 1, 2006, to show that he can operate a motor vehicle; documents created by DMV since May 1, 2006, concerning Plaintiff's ability to drive a motor vehicle, including any restrictions; documents reflecting the results of any vision tests of Plaintiff on or after May 1, 2006; documents concerning Plaintiff's vision on or after May 1, 2006; and documents concerning Plaintiff eyes on or after May 1, 2006. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)
